ModMetaData.name: Robot Repair Station
ModMetaData.author: TuNombre
ModMetaData.description:
Adds a Robot Repair Station for BioTech mechanoids.
When a mechanoid's health drops below a configurable threshold, it will automatically seek out the nearest Robot Repair Station and begin self-repair. The station requires power and consumes steel to perform repairs.
Features: - Robots automatically seek repair when health is low - Configurable health threshold for triggering repair - Consumes steel resources during repair - Requires power to operate - Compatible with all vanilla BioTech mechanoids
Requires Biotech DLC.
